query_normalized: linking resting‑state fmri entropy to creative problem solving neuroscience
rationale: The paper examines a resting‑state neural measure (EEG functional connectivity) and its relationship to creativity‑related outcomes (creative self‑efficacy and engagement), which aligns with the user’s interest in linking intrinsic brain activity (resting‑state fMRI entropy) to creative problem solving.
